architectural_decisions.summary: Hybrid — in-process CLI tick scheduler; packets/queue/tick state persisted to Supabase tables for operator-grade replay.

Bounded LLM wrapper — real LLM API calls allowed (OpenAI/Anthropic) behind a strict JSON schema, forbidden-copy regex, cited-id whitelist, and deterministic template fallback. Default provider is FixtureProvider (network-free).

milestones.title: End-to-end vertical slice + Q1–Q10 smoke survey + full regression

governance_guards: Layer 1 never mutates the active Today registry; its side-effects are packets + queue jobs only.
Layer 2 high-severity findings escalate the packet (status=escalated) and enqueue a quality_queue job; no data is auto-repaired.
Layer 3 reuses the bounded persona_candidates_v1 harness, rate-limited to 3 candidates per cycle. No registry or factor_validation writes.

Layer 4 operates in proposal mode only: PromotionGatePacketV1 + RegistryUpdateProposalV1. Final registry write stays with the governed build-metis-brain-bundle-from-factor-validation CLI run by a human operator.

Layer 5 enforces forbidden-copy on answers, requires JSON-schema conformance, and rejects any cited packet id that is not in the state bundle — on any violation it falls back to a deterministic template and records llm_fallback=True.
UserQueryActionPacketV1 payloads are redacted (redact_mapping) so forbidden tokens never leak back into stored packet bodies.
smoke_commands_fixed: PYTHONPATH=src python3 src/main.py harness-ask --asset TRGP --question "오늘 왜 이 종목이 움직였지?"

full_suite.note: Pre-existing failure unrelated to AGH v1 (documented in HANDOFF). AGH v1 introduces zero new regressions.

non_goals_confirmed: No free-narrative AI memo is part of the active bundle.
No portfolio / broker / position / PnL surface is introduced.
No skin polish or IR deck work.
No direct registry write from any harness layer.
